description: A designed 'rogues-gallery' card from ICE on a textured dark-blue denim/grunge background. Three booking/mugshot photos of young men are presented as tilted white-bordered Polaroid-style snapshots scattered across the frame, each captioned in a handwritten-style font with the subject's name: 'WILSON CONSTANZA-GALDAMEZ' (lower left), 'EDIS OMAR VALENZUELA RODRIGUEZ' (upper right, in orange jail uniform), and 'JONATHAN JOSUE PESQUERA-PUERTO' (lower right). In the upper-left corner a bold red, outlined, slightly 3D headline reads 'MS-13 Terrorists.' The lower-left corner carries the white DHS seal, the 'ICE' wordmark, a red 'LEARN MORE' bar, and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' The Polaroid/scrapbook styling and dramatic red gang label are deliberate design choices to vilify the individuals and dramatize the arrests. The technique is fear/threat messaging linking immigration enforcement to violent gangs. Target audience: the public, to build support for ICE's anti-gang operations. Tweet text references 'Three more Maryland Men' and an MS-13 racketeering/murder conspiracy.
notable_text: MS-13 Terrorists | WILSON CONSTANZA-GALDAMEZ | EDIS OMAR VALENZUELA RODRIGUEZ | JONATHAN JOSUE PESQUERA-PUERTO | LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
